name: TRACE: An Operational Reasoning Schema for Auditable Agentic Commitments
summary: arXiv:2607.12480v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper defines TRACE (Typed Reasoning And Commitment Evidence): a typed, versioned schema for recording reasoning traces, a reference procedure f...
description: arXiv:2607.12480v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper defines TRACE (Typed Reasoning And Commitment Evidence): a typed, versioned schema for recording reasoning traces, a reference procedure for writing records against it, and one operating discipline, no durable state change without a record. The paper argues in three layers that reasoning is not in the language model: the autoregressive...
author: Edward Y. Chang, Emily J. Chang
